subject: Following up on our Series A conversation
snippet: Loved the demo last week. Our partnership wants to dig into your retention numbers before we move forward...
body:
Hi there,

Great catching up last week — the team is genuinely excited. Before we take this to our Monday partner meeting, could you send over the cohort retention curves and your current burn? We'd like to move quickly if the numbers hold up.

Best,
Priya
Northwind Ventures

subject: URGENT: dashboard down for our whole team
snippet: Nobody on our account can log in since this morning. We have a board demo in 2 hours and this is blocking us...
body:
Your dashboard has been throwing a 500 error for everyone on our team since about 8am. We're a paying customer and we have a board demo at noon that depends on this. Please tell me someone is looking at it.

Marcus, Head of Ops at BrightLoop

subject: Pricing for a 12-person team?
snippet: Found you through a friend. We're evaluating tools this quarter — do you have team pricing and is there a trial?
body:
Hello,

A colleague recommended your product. We're a 12-person marketing team comparing a few options this quarter. Could you share team pricing tiers and whether there's a free trial or a guided demo? Trying to make a decision by end of month.

Thanks,
Dana

subject: Senior backend engineer — interested in your role
snippet: Saw your job post. I have two strong candidates who could start in 4 weeks. Want me to send profiles?
body:
Hi,

I came across your senior backend engineer opening. I represent two engineers with strong distributed-systems backgrounds who are actively looking and could start within a month. Happy to send anonymized profiles if you're open to it — no fee unless you hire.

Cheers,
TalentForge

subject: Your invoice for May is available
snippet: Your monthly invoice of $4,212.18 is ready. No action needed unless you have questions about charges.
body:
Hello,

Your AWS invoice for the May billing period is now available in the console. Total due: $4,212.18, auto-charged to your card on file on the 5th. This is an automated notice; reply only if you have questions about specific line items.

AWS Billing

subject: Coffee when you're back in town?
snippet: Hey! Heard you're visiting next month. Would love to grab coffee and catch up — it's been way too long.
body:
Heyyy,

My cousin mentioned you'll be in Austin next month. It's been ages! Any chance you're free for a coffee or a walk? No agenda, just want to catch up. Let me know what works.

- Sam
